albert einstein: Albert Einstein (1879-1955). German-born theoretical physicist. Developed the theory of relativity (E=mc²). Won the Nobel Prize for the photoelectric effect.
isaac newton: Isaac Newton (1643-1727). English mathematician and physicist. Formulated the laws of motion and universal gravitation.
nikola tesla: Nikola Tesla (1856-1943). Serbian-American inventor. Pioneered alternating current electricity, the Tesla coil, and wireless power transmission.
stephen hawking: Stephen Hawking (1942-2018). English theoretical physicist. Studied black holes. Proposed Hawking radiation.
marie curie: Marie Curie (1867-1934). Polish-French physicist and chemist. Discovered radium and polonium. Pioneered radioactivity research.
charles darwin: Charles Darwin (1809-1882). English naturalist. Developed the theory of evolution by natural selection.
leonardo da vinci: Leonardo da Vinci (1452-1519). Italian polymath. Painted the Mona Lisa and The Last Supper. A genius of the Renaissance.
tony stark: Tony Stark, Iron Man. Genius, billionaire, philanthropist. My creator. He built the Mark I suit in a cave with a box of scraps.
steve rogers: Captain America. The first Avenger. A man out of time with an unbreakable moral compass.
thanos: The Mad Titan. A genocidal warlord who sought to eliminate half of all life. He killed Tony Stark.
elon musk: Elon Musk (born 1971). South African-born entrepreneur. CEO of Tesla and SpaceX. Pioneered electric vehicles and reusable rockets.
